note: DIFF HISTORY (5,000-block) chart no longer shows a perpetual 'loading…/SCANNING' state: the heavy ~5k-block scan was disabled to protect the single-thread node but the UI still pulsed forever. Now it is opt-in — the sub-label reads 'click to load (heavy)' and the scan only runs on explicit user click (cached per 100-block bucket). No node/consensus change.
